title: hieracium vasconicum subsp. dolosum
intro: Hieracium vasconicum subsp. dolosum, also known as Hieracium dolosum, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family Asteraceae. It is a type of hawkweed, a perennial herb with bright yellow flowers and a rosette of leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and is believed to have health benefits such as reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hieracium dolosum is typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in some remedies for skin conditions and wounds.
